normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_length_preserved (arr : List Int) : length (merge_sort arr) = length arr
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output has the same length as the input.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_sorted_nondec (arr : List Int) : Sorted (· ≤ ·) (merge_sort arr)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output is sorted in nondecreasing order.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_permutation (arr : List Int) : merge_sort arr ~p arr
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The output is a permutation of the input (same multiset of elements).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_terminates (arr : List Int) : Acc (fun a b => length b < length a) arr
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Top-down merge sort terminates because recursive calls are on strictly smaller lists.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_output_length_optimal (arr : List Int) : length (merge_sort arr) = length arr
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The algorithm returns exactly one element per input element (no loss or duplication).
